description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/nobodyinperson/simbuto/ubuntu_16.04, defines the stages build, build-test, install-test, app-test, deploy and deploy-test, sets the variables AUTOCONF_INSTALL_DIR=install-dir and DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR=debian-package, caches all untracked files per job, and runs a before_script that executes `apt-get -qq update` and `apt-get -qq -y install at r-base-core udev pkg-config python3-dbus`. Add a build job named autoconf-build in the build stage that runs `./configure` then `make`; add a build-test job named autoconf-clean-test that runs `git clean -fdx` and `tests/autoconf/build-clean-test.sh`; add an install-test job named autoconf-install-uninstall that runs `./configure --prefix=$(pwd)/$AUTOCONF_INSTALL_DIR`, `make`, `make install`, `find $AUTOCONF_INSTALL_DIR -type f`, `test -n "$(find $AUTOCONF_INSTALL_DIR -type f)"`, `make uninstall`, `find $AUTOCONF_INSTALL_DIR -type f`, and `test -z "$(find $AUTOCONF_INSTALL_DIR -type f)"`. Add a build job named debian-package-build that installs `dh-systemd` with `apt-get -qq -y install dh-systemd`, builds the package using `dpkg-buildpackage -us -uc`, creates the directory `$DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR` with `mkdir -p $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR`, copies the resulting *.deb, *.dsc and *.changes files into it with `cp ../*.deb ../*.dsc ../*.changes $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR`, and publishes those files as artifacts named `${CI_JOB_STAGE}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}`; add a build-test job named debian-package-test that runs `dpkg-deb -I $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb`, `dpkg -c $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb` and `lintian $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb`; add an install-test job named debian-package-install-uninstall that installs the package with `dpkg -i $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb` and then removes it with `dpkg -r $(dpkg -I $DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb | perl -ne 'if(s/^\s*package:\s*(\w+)$/$1/ig){print;exit}')`. Add a deploy job named apt-deploy that runs only on tags, sets `GIT_STRATEGY=none`, targets the production environment at http://apt.nobodyinperson.de, starts the ssh agent with `eval $(ssh-agent -s)`, adds the private key via `ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_DEPLOY_PRIVATE_KEY")`, prepares `~/.ssh` and known hosts with `mkdir -p ~/.ssh` and `echo "$SSH_DEPLOY_HOSTKEYS" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts`, and securely copies all `.deb` files using `scp -qP "$SSH_DEPLOY_PORT" "$DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR"/*.deb "$SSH_DEPLOY_ADDRESS"`. Finally, add a deploy-test job named apt-install-test that also runs only on tags with `GIT_STRATEGY=none`, updates apt with `apt-get update -qq`, installs wget via `apt-get install -qq wget`, extracts the built deb file with `export DEBFILE=($DEBIAN_PACKAGE_DIR/*.deb)`, prints its name, determines the package name and version using perl one‑liners, adds the repository GPG key via `wget -qO- http://apt.nobodyinperson.de/gpg.key | apt-key add -`, creates the source list entry `echo "deb http://apt.nobodyinperson.de unstable main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/nobodyinperson.list`, updates apt again, downloads the package with `apt-get download -y -qq $PACKAGE_NAME`, extracts the version of the downloaded package, verifies it matches the built version with `test "$PACKAGE_VERSION" = "$APT_PACKAGE_VERSION"`, and finally installs the package using `apt-get install -y -qq $PACKAGE_NAME`.
